headline: A Look At Domino’s Pizza (DPZ) Valuation After Strong Q4 Growth And Higher Dividend
summary: Domino's Pizza (DPZ) is back in focus after reporting fourth quarter results that included global retail sales growth, net store expansion, and a 15% lift in the quarterly dividend to US$1.99 per share. See our latest analysis for Domino's Pizza. Despite the strong fourth quarter update and dividend lift, Domino's Pizza's recent share price performance has been mixed, with a 1-day share price return decline of 3.67%, a year to date share price return decline of 5.82%, and a 1-year total...
